title: Bepo Reunites With Luffy's Group
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on bepo reunites with luffy's group within the The Mink Tribe and Jack's Ruin storyline.
scene: The crew encounters the Mink Tribe, Heart Pirates, and the aftermath of Jack's attack, turning the search for Sanji's group urgent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here, a fluttery thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You, Bananas!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: NGAH!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: YAAAY! BA-NA-NA~(1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Because of

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Uuoff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that really all 8 we needed to do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: -Nooooo-

dialogue.speaker: Mink Guardian
dialogue.text: While forest, guardians, bull mink, body

dialogue.speaker: Mink Guardian
dialogue.text: Whale Forest, Guardians, Gorilla Mink, BB (Black Back)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A... dog?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: you. You're Straw Hat luffy, no?

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: I'm wanda! Those guys won't be posing a threat to you anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Please stop fighting as well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This crazy place sure is full of a bunch of weirdos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just minding my own business! Then, all of a sudden, they were all over me!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's like a whole country of choppers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what happens when you trespass into a forest uninvited...

dialogue.speaker: Mink Guardian
dialogue.text: Guardians! I'll be removing him from the vicinity. I'd appreciate it if you could look the other way, this once.

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: In deference to Wanda... Fall Back! Rody! BB!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: pedro.

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Everyone, Fall Back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hold on.... they had me surrounded!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just be thankful the moon isn't out right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi di! There's more important things to be talking about! Straw hat, don't tell me you've forgotten who we are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We saved your behind during the war of the greatest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm shocked!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hm? Oh! You're that talking bear from Traffy's crew!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Traffy? You've got it all wrong, we're subordinates of Trafalgar Law!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: The heart pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah. That's what I said.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No it isn't!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Man, we've been keeping up to date with the papers! Crazy News at every turn! I guess we're in an alliance now, huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is our Captain with you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Yeah. Traffy's here too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you hard of hearing, we have no relation to this Traffy!? AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI AI!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Traffy... is what I call law.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, is that so!? I had no idea!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: So the Captain really is here! Yay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't wait to see the captain! Waaaah!

summary: Bepo Reunites With Luffy's Group: Luffy's group meets Wanda, Carrot, Pedro, Bepo and the Mink guardians while learning that Jack destroyed the Mokomo Dukedom and that Sanji's group may still be alive.
